Name: TapeTech Corner Roller
Short description: The TapeTech Corner Roller delivers consistent, spring-loaded pressure to securely embed paper tape and corner beads into drywall joints. This professional-grade tool prevents bubbling and lifting, ensuring a durable, high-quality finish on every corner.
Description:
TapeTech Corner Roller

The TapeTech Corner Roller provides the necessary force to embed paper tape and paper-faced beads into drywall corners, ensuring a secure bond that prevents lifting and bubbling. By applying consistent, full-contact pressure, this tool eliminates common installation failures and reduces the need for time-consuming callbacks.

Engineered for daily production environments, the tool features a robust aluminum frame designed to withstand the rigors of professional job sites. Its spring-loaded mechanism maintains uniform pressure across the entire width of the tape, creating a reliable foundation for a smooth, crack-free finish.

Features:
  • Precision Embedding: Available in specialized configurations for inside 90-degree corners, standard outside corners, and flexible paper-faced beads.
  • Consistent Pressure: Integrated spring-loaded system ensures even force distribution for bubble-free adhesion.
  • Professional Durability: Constructed with a high-grade aluminum frame for long-term reliability in demanding conditions.
  • Workflow Efficiency: A critical component for high-speed, high-quality drywall finishing sequences.

Name: TapeTech Wizard® Compact Finishing Box Handle - Power Assist
Short description: The TapeTech Wizard® Compact Finishing Box Handle - Power Assist offers superior control and maneuverability for drywall finishing in tight or overhead spaces. Its ergonomic design reduces operator fatigue while maintaining consistent pressure for a professional-grade finish.
Description:
TapeTech Wizard® Compact Finishing Box Handle - Power Assist provides the necessary leverage and control for drywall finishing in confined areas where standard handles are too cumbersome. This tool is specifically engineered for low soffits, narrow corridors, and overhead applications, ensuring consistent pressure and a professional finish in tight quarters. The handle integrates seamlessly with existing finishing boxes, maintaining the high standards required for daily job site use.

Features:

  • Compact Maneuverability: A shortened, agile profile allows for precise control in restricted spaces where full-length handles lack the necessary clearance.
  • Power Assist Ergonomics: The specialized grip design minimizes physical strain during overhead work and awkward-angle finishing tasks.
  • Durable Aluminum Build: Constructed with a rigid, lightweight shaft to ensure consistent box pressure and long-term reliability.
  • Universal Compatibility: Designed to connect securely with TapeTech finishing boxes and most other industry-standard equipment.
  • Professional Reliability: Backed by a comprehensive manufacturer warranty to support consistent performance on demanding projects.
